name: axr
description: Agent eXecution Readiness scoring. Scores a repository against the AXR rubric and produces machine-readable and human-readable reports.

commands.name: axr
commands.description: Run a full AXR assessment on the current repository

commands.name: axr-check
commands.description: Run AXR assessment for a single dimension — scheduled for Phase 2, stub in Phase 1

commands.name: axr-diff
commands.description: Compare current AXR score to the previous run — scheduled for Phase 4, stub in Phase 1
